data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of privacy-first storage of sensitive identifiers, but the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this requirement. There is no indication of how sensitive identifiers are stored, hashed, or managed within the system, leading to a clear gap in the requirement coverage. The absence of relevant evidence to support the requirement indicates that it has not been satisfied.
gaps: No evidence confirming the privacy-first storage of sensitive identifiers, including hashing where needed.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for sensitive identifier storage
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that sensitive identifiers are stored in a privacy-first manner, including checks for hashing.
